title: bromus mollis var. vulgaris
intro: Bromus mollis var. vulgaris, commonly known as soft brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of soft brome include soothing irritated airways, reducing fever, and promoting relaxation. Soft brome can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried flowers for medicinal use, with some traditional herbalists also using it in combination with other herbs for added therapeutic effects.
